name: It is irrelevant to ask who the person was and the place where this incident occurred
introduction:
The real purpose in mentioning this event is to show how God showed light to the one who
had chosen God as his protector and supporter. As for determining the name of the person
and the locality, we neither possess the means to do so, nor is such an endeavour in any way
beneficial. What seems to be evident from the statement that follows is that the person
concerned must necessarily have been a Prophet.
